title: 04 Cai
zine-seo-title: 04 Cai - A Journey Through Ancient Egypt: From Childhood Dreams to Reality
zine-seo-description: Follow along on a magical journey through Egypt, where childhood fascination transforms into reality. Experience the wonders of the Nile River cruise, discover ancient historical sites, and share in the romance of a honeymoon adventure from Istanbul to the land of the pharaohs.
content:
04 Cai

Egypt has always fascinated me. Ever since I was a kid, I've watched documentaries about this mythical country, though I never really thought I'd go there one day. But since we knew we'd be in Istanbul — relatively close, at least compared to Québec — my partner and I decided to treat ourselves to a real vacation. A week in Egypt felt like the perfect choice.

It was a magnificent trip, with a cruise on the Nile serving as our honeymoon — a nice excuse to indulge in a slightly more luxurious getaway. We truly loved the places steeped in history and that feeling of being transported to another time.
